data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson Anticipates Inflation to Return to 2%
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson has stated that while some upward risks remain, inflation is expected to return to the 2% trajectory.

data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson Discusses Policy Rate Adjustments
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson stated that the current policy stance positions the institution advantageously to determine the extent and timing of policy rate adjustments.

data.title: XRP Ledger DeFi Expands Beyond Payments as Institutional Use Grows
data.description:
The XRP Ledger (XRPL) ecosystem is undergoing a structural shift in early 2026, moving well beyond its historical role as a fast payment network. New decentralized finance (DeFi) applications, institutional-grade lending tools, and deeper liquidity infrastructure are transforming XRPL into a broader financial platform.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-ledger-defi-expands-beyond-payments-as-institutional-use-grows/

data.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan Inc enters Nasdaq delisting window
data.description:
Canaan Inc. , a major player in the Bitcoin mining hardware space, has received a Nasdaq notification regarding non-compliance with the exchange’s minimum bid price requirement. Nasdaq has now put the company in what is often called a “delisting window. ” However, it is crucial to note that the delisting is yet to be enforced. What does […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canaan-inc-enters-nasdaq-delisting-window/

data.title: Bitcoin Price Will Still Rally Above $99,000 Despite Bearish Sentiment, Here’s Why
data.description:
Crypto analyst TARA has predicted that the Bitcoin price will still rally despite bearish signals that have surfaced. She highlighted why the flagship crypto could reach this level and what could happen once it touches the price target. Analyst Predicts Bitcoin Price Surge To $99,000 In an X post, TARA opined that the Bitcoin price will reach $99,300, even though the flagship crypto is printing a bearish candlestick. She stated that BTC wants to touch this price target before it retraces deeper so that the correction does not break the critical support at $90,000
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-will-rally-above-99000/

data.title: Capital One Prepares To Hand $425,000,000 To Customers After Receiving Court Approval on Massive Settlement
data.description:
US financial giant Capital One just received a court approval for a settlement that will deliver a massive payout to current and former customers. A judge has granted Capital One preliminary approval to settle a class-action lawsuit filed by depositors who alleged the bank cheated them out of interest payments.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/16/capital-one-prepares-to-hand-425000000-to-customers-after-receiving-court-approval-on-massive-settlement/

data.title: US lender Newrez to accept crypto holdings in mortgage approval
data.description:
The new policy will allow borrowers to use Bitcoin, Ether, crypto ETFs and US dollar-backed stablecoins for asset verification and income estimates without liquidation.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-lender-newrez-crypto-holdings-mortgage-approval?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto futures legitimized by CME with Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar addition, but retail traders face a massive catch
data.description:
The era of the crypto industry being seen as a two-asset town is officially over at the world’s largest derivatives marketplace. On Jan. 15, CME Group announced plans to launch futures contracts for Cardano (ADA), Chainlink (LINK), and Stellar (XLM) on Feb. 9, pending regulatory review
source: https://cryptoslate.com/cmes-bold-bet-on-cardano-chainlink-and-stellar-futures/

data.title: Crypto makes inroads into US real estate as Megatel, Newrez clear hurdles for payments, ​rewards token
data.description:
Two major U. S. real estate firms, Newrez LLC and Megatel Homes LLC, have announced that cryptocurrencies will be a big part of their businesses moving forward, per their disclosures. Newrez LLC announced that it will now count cryptocurrency as part of the mortgage risk assessment of potential homebuyers. Meanwhile, Megatel Homes LLC has announced that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/megatel-newrez-payments-rewards-token/
